scripts.build: pnpm build:cf && pnpm build:vc && pnpm build:nf
scripts.build:external-fixture: pnpm build:platform external --config ../../plugins/fixtures/runtime-external/i0c.runtime.config.ts && node scripts/check-platform-build.mjs external platforms/external.js @example/runtime-feature-external
scripts.build:cf: pnpm build:platform cloudflare && node scripts/check-platform-build.mjs cloudflare platforms/cloudflare.js
scripts.build:vc: pnpm build:platform vercel && node scripts/prepare-vercel-output.mjs && node scripts/check-platform-build.mjs vercel api/index.js
scripts.build:nf: pnpm build:platform netlify && node scripts/prepare-netlify-output.mjs && node scripts/check-platform-build.mjs netlify platforms/netlify-edge.js
